summary: SLA Tracking Dashboard feature testing complete - All 11 backend APIs pass (100%), all 10 frontend sub-views working correctly with proper data visualization
context_for_next_testing_agent: SLA Tracker has 10 sub-views accessible via data-testid='sla-view-{id}'. APIs all return proper data structures. Run Escalations button triggers escalation check. Policies can be edited and saved. All charts render correctly with Recharts.

backend_api_tests.GET_dashboard: PASS - Returns overall_compliance, total_open, total_within_sla, total_warning, total_breached, severity_stats per severity
backend_api_tests.GET_metrics: PASS - Returns MTTR by severity, resolution_within_sla, overall_mttr_hours/days, avg_triage_hours, total_resolved, resolved_this_week
backend_api_tests.GET_team_performance: PASS - Returns team array with per-assignee stats (total, open, resolved, breached, within_sla, compliance_pct, avg_mttr)
backend_api_tests.GET_policies: PASS - Returns policies array (severity, sla_hours, is_default) and defaults object
backend_api_tests.PUT_policies: PASS - Updates SLA hours per severity, returns updated policies with is_default=false and updated_at
backend_api_tests.GET_breach_timeline: PASS - Returns timeline array with daily breach counts by severity, period_days
backend_api_tests.GET_at_risk: PASS - Returns items array with CVE details, sla_status (approaching/warning/breached), percent_elapsed, escalation_level
backend_api_tests.GET_escalation_rules: PASS - Returns rules array with level, name, threshold_pct, action, notify_role
backend_api_tests.GET_escalation_stats: PASS - Returns total, open, acknowledged, assigned, resolved counts
backend_api_tests.GET_history: PASS - Returns history array with daily compliance snapshots
backend_api_tests.data_integrity_dashboard_at_risk: PASS - Dashboard breached count matches at-risk breached items
backend_api_tests.data_integrity_team_totals: PASS - Team member total = open + resolved for all members
backend_api_tests.PUT_policies_restore: PASS - Policies restored to defaults after test

frontend_ui_tests.overview_tab: PASS - Shows compliance health banner (37.5%), 6 stat cards (Total Open, Within SLA, Warning, Breached, MTTR, Resolved), 4 severity cards, bar chart
frontend_ui_tests.metrics_tab: PASS - Shows 4 MTTR cards per severity with compliance %, MTTR vs SLA chart, Resolution SLA Compliance chart
frontend_ui_tests.at_risk_tab: PASS - Shows 12 at-risk CVEs with severity badges, BREACHED status, L3 escalation level, overdue progress bars
frontend_ui_tests.breach_timeline_tab: PASS - Shows Total Breaches, Peak Day, Daily Average, Zero-Breach Days stats, stacked bar chart by severity, cumulative area chart
frontend_ui_tests.team_performance_tab: PASS - Shows Team Members count, Total Resolved, Total Breached, Top Performer, table with per-assignee compliance bars
frontend_ui_tests.escalation_rules_tab: PASS - Shows 3 editable rules (L1-L3) with Level, Name, Threshold %, Action dropdown, Add Rule button
frontend_ui_tests.policies_tab: PASS - Shows 4 severity policy cards with editable SLA hours input, Reset to Defaults and Save Policies buttons, Policy Reference section
frontend_ui_tests.trends_tab: PASS - Shows SLA Compliance Trend (30 Days) line chart, Open vs Breached CVEs Over Time area chart
frontend_ui_tests.run_escalations_button: PASS - Triggers escalation check, shows result banner (12 Checked, 0 Escalated, 3 Rules Applied)
frontend_ui_tests.tab_navigation: PASS - All 10 sub-tabs clickable via data-testid='sla-view-{id}'
